Title: Changes in susceptibility of Plasmodium falciparum to antimalarial drugs in Uganda over time: 2019-2024.
Authors: Okitwi M, Orena S, Tumwebaze PK, Katairo T, Taremwa Y, Byaruhanga O, Tukwasibwe S, Nsobya SL, Legac J, Cooper RA, Conrad MD, Rosenthal PJ
Journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
Internal.Notes: Results collected from 2016-2019 have been published elsewhere. Therefore, prevalence data only entered from 2020-2024
